name: meta-ads-mcp
description: A Python MCP server for Meta (Facebook & Instagram) Ads API integration
long_description: Comprehensive read-only access to Meta Ads data through Claude and other MCP clients. Query campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives, audiences, pixels, insights, page performance, and more — all in natural language via the Meta Graph API.

tools.name: list_ad_accounts
tools.description: Lists ad accounts linked to the Facebook access token

tools.name: get_details_of_ad_account
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad account

tools.name: get_adaccount_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for an ad account

tools.name: get_campaign_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for a campaign

tools.name: get_adset_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for an ad set

tools.name: get_ad_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for an ad

tools.name: fetch_pagination_url
tools.description: Fetches data from a pagination URL

tools.name: get_ad_creative_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad creative

tools.name: get_ad_creatives_by_ad_id
tools.description: Retrieves creatives associated with an ad

tools.name: get_ad_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad

tools.name: get_ads_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves ads within an ad account

tools.name: get_ads_by_campaign
tools.description: Retrieves ads within a campaign

tools.name: get_ads_by_adset
tools.description: Retrieves ads within an ad set

tools.name: get_adset_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad set

tools.name: get_adsets_by_ids
tools.description: Retrieves details for multiple ad sets by their IDs

tools.name: get_adsets_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves ad sets within an ad account

tools.name: get_adsets_by_campaign
tools.description: Retrieves ad sets within a campaign

tools.name: get_campaign_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific campaign

tools.name: get_campaigns_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves campaigns within an ad account

tools.name: get_activities_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves change history for an ad account

tools.name: get_activities_by_adset
tools.description: Retrieves change history for an ad set

facebook_access_token.title: Facebook Access Token
facebook_access_token.description: Facebook User Access Token with necessary permissions (e.g., ads_read)
